rag_rules: Use AGREE annex blocks to define assumptions and guarantees for the GCAS_Recovery component type
Place assumptions and guarantees in the component type scope, not implementation scope
Use valid AGREE syntax for assumptions and guarantees
Use visible identifiers from the current visible identifiers list when available
generic_rules: Use initialized temporal recurrence for stateful equations
Use nested if ... then ... else for branching logic
Use AGREE logical operators such as and, or, not(...), and implication =>
Place input envelope assumptions and output range guarantees inside annex agree only when concrete bounds, named constants, or visible relations are available
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use assume "label": expression; and guarantee "label": expression; for assumptions and guarantees
Use eq name : type = expression; for equations
Use const name : type = value; for constants
Use assign output = expression; for assignments
anti_patterns: Do not use implementation-only subcomponent paths in a component type annex
Do not encode AADL timing properties as AGREE expressions unless the model exposes explicit typed ports or constants for them
Do not use component ports in a component type contract unless represented through valid variables or outputs
irrelevant_topics: AADL property names are not AGREE variables
